sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26518" key="diekphda/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διεκ-πηδάω</orth>, <sense id="n26518.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">jump, run about,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:6:26:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.26.6</biblScope> </bibl>; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bound violently,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">καρδία</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:2:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.13</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
